recommendations.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
recommendations.overview: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.

recommendations.title: The Best Years
recommendations.overview: Italy from the '80s to the present day, through the dreams, loves, successes and failures of four friends.

recommendations.title: Seven Pounds
recommendations.overview: An IRS agent with a fateful secret embarks on an extraordinary journey of redemption by forever changing the lives of seven strangers.

recommendations.title: Kiss Me Again
recommendations.overview: A look at the lives of Carlo, Giulia, and their friends some 10 years after the events of L'Ultimo bacio.

recommendations.title: Fathers and Daughters
recommendations.overview: A Pulitzer-winning writer grapples with being a widower and father after a mental breakdown, while, 27 years later, his grown daughter struggles to forge connections of her own.

recommendations.title: Playing for Keeps
recommendations.overview: A former sports star who's fallen on hard times starts coaching his son's soccer team in an attempt to get his life together.

recommendations.title: Summertime
recommendations.overview: A gay couple living in San Francisco takes in two strangers traveling from Italy to start a new life in America, discovering each other and forming the most unlikely of relationships along the way.

recommendations.title: There's No Place Like Home
recommendations.overview: An extended family reunites on an idyllic island to celebrate their grandparents' 50th wedding anniversary. However, a storm causes them to get stuck in there longer than expected, causing secrets and long-held grudges to break out.

recommendations.title: But Forever In My Mind
recommendations.overview: Teenage problems intertwine during the occupation of a high school in Rome. Silvio—much like his peers desperate to lose his virginity—wants to make his move on the girl he likes, despite her being already his friend's girlfriend and not knowing that

recommendations.title: The Last Kiss
